expires_today.title: Spring Into Creativity
expires_today.long_description: Unlock four elite editing software programs for one low price with the all-new Spring Into Creativity Bundle. Make every shot your best with the advanced photo editing tools in PaintShop Pro 2023. Save hours of time spent editing at your computer with the efficient AI-based solutions of AfterShot Pro 2023. Turn your best moments into unique movies with the easy-to-use editing software VideoStudio Pro. Create your own AI talking photos with PhotoMirage. Pay what you want for a comprehensive creative library and help support Extra Life with your purchase.

expires_tomorrow.title: Data Visualization & Storytelling by Wiley
expires_tomorrow.long_description: Show—don’t tell—when you integrate storytelling into your data to help paint a broader picture. Unlock eBooks from leading authors in the space, like the For Dummies team, and awesome titles like Cool Infographics: Effective Communication with Data Visualization and Design, Data Points: Visualization That Means Something, and Data-Driven Security: Analysis, Visualization and Dashboards. Pay what you want for a powerful collection of data visualization and storytelling eBooks from some of the biggest names in tech, and help support the Electronic Frontier Foundation!

expires_tomorrow.title: The Cybersecurity & AI Defense Mega Bundle by Packt
expires_tomorrow.description: Defend your sensitive data with AI
expires_tomorrow.long_description: Nothing gets past our latest Humble Video Learning Bundle: The Cybersecurity & AI Defense Mega Bundle! Learn how to protect your digital world using AI defensive tactics with exceptional courses from Packt. Prepare for your new career with video learning courses like Cybersecurity Fundamentals & Certification Prep – ISC2 Pathway, Mastering Cybersecurity with Python - From Basics to Advanced Defense, AZ-500 - Microsoft Azure Security Technologies - A Prep Course, more. Go from zero to cybersecurity hero, and help support the Starlight Foundation with your purchase!

expires_tomorrow.title: The Ultimate Functional Programming by Pragmatic Programmers
expires_tomorrow.long_description: Start creating with a function-focused mindset with the all-new Functional Programming Bundle by Pragmatic Programmers. Learn to execute a variety of functions to save time and energy for yourself, a business, or a new programming hobby. Unlock cornerstone eBooks like Domain Modeling Made Functional, Programming Clojure Fourth Edition, From Objects to Functions, and more. Get practical resources for novice coders and seasoned pros, and help support Save the Children with your purchase!

expires_tomorrow.title: The Ultimate GenAI & LLM Developer Bundle
expires_tomorrow.long_description: Learn how to create your own LLMs and GenAI that understand, generate, and process at lightning speed with an all-new Humble Video Learning Bundle. Jump-start your career with this 15+ course library, highlighted by The Complete LangChain & LLMs Guide and AI & LLM Engineering Mastery - GenAI, RAG Complete Guide, you’ll gain the knowledge and confidence you need to succeed in these challenging and in-demand fields. Pay what you want for the ultimate GenAI and LLM bundle, and help support the World Wildlife Fund with your purchase!

expires_within_72h.title: Music for Dummies 2026
expires_within_72h.long_description:
The sweet sounds of savings have arrived to make your foray into musical stardom even easier with the 2026 Music for Dummies Bundle! The professionals from the For Dummies series are back again to help you unleash your inner musician. Learn a variety of digital instruments with in-depth lessons like eMedia Guitar For Dummies Level 1-2, eMedia Piano For Dummies Level 1-2, and eMedia Singing For Dummies Level 1-2. Take your passion for digital music to superstar levels of greatness, and help support the World Wildlife Fund with your purchase.

Keys expire. Please redeem before December 16th, 2026

expires_within_72h.title: The Ultimate Linux & SysAdmin Bundle
expires_within_72h.long_description: Learn the skills and gain the knowledge you need to succeed in system administration and development operations for Linux with this bundle of insightful courses by Packt. Inside this amazing curriculum, you’ll get expert insights on mastering AI networking, Windows 365, PowerShell scripting, and more. Deepen your understanding of SysAdmin and DevOps whether you’re a novice or a seasoned professional with courses like The Ultimate Linux Shell Scripting Guide, Microsoft Intune Cookbook - 2E and help support the Prevent Cancer Foundation with your purchase!

expires_within_72h.title: Hot Mess Express: A Big Bundle of Misfit Heroes & Hilarious Hijinks by Image Comics
expires_within_72h.long_description:
The content in this bundle is intended for mature audiences.

Lose yourself in a library of fantastic graphic fiction in The Hot Mess Express Bundle by Image Comics! Read creative graphic novels like Snotgirl Vol. 1: Green Hair Don’t Care, the coming-of-age story of Lottie Person, a chic yet insecure fashionista with a mysterious snot condition; I Hate Fairyland Deluxe Vol. 1-3, a mischievously magical dark adventure akin to Alice in Wonderland; and Dead Eyes Vol. 1, the origin story of Martin Dobbs, a former masked criminal forced back into a life of crime to pay his wife’s medical bills. Get 40+ comics and graphic novels, and help support The BINC Foundation with your purchase!
